protocols.Paper_title: Identification and characterization of the two-component cell lysis cassette encoded by temperate bacteriophage φPYB5 of Lactobacillus fermentum
protocols.Evidence: After induction, cells... were harvested by centrifugation... total proteins were extracted by suspending the cells in... SDS-buffer... denatured by heating at 100°C

protocols.Paper_title: Identification and characterization of the two-component cell lysis cassette encoded by temperate bacteriophage φPYB5 of Lactobacillus fermentum
protocols.Evidence: Bacteria cells were harvested... washed thrice with distilled water... The supernatant obtained... by centrifugation after 4 h induction was used as the crude Lyb5 extract.

protocols.Paper_title: Identification and characterization of the two-component cell lysis cassette encoded by temperate bacteriophage φPYB5 of Lactobacillus fermentum
protocols.Evidence: After electrophoresis, the gel was washed... then transferred into... buffer... containing... Triton X-100
